items.title: Guidance: The UK's accession to CPTPP for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs)
items.summary: Information on the UK’s accession to the Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) and how CPTPP can benefit and support SMEs.

items.title: Transparency data: DESNZ workforce management information, June 2026
items.summary: Report on departmental staff numbers and costs.

items.title: Guidance: Contributing to the IPCC
items.summary: This page contains guidance for UK experts on how they can contribute to the United Nations’ Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC).

items.title: Notice: Working Group I Contribution to the IPCC AR7, The Physical Science Basis: expert review
items.summary: The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) has announced the expert review of the First Order Draft of its Working Group I contribution to the Seventh Assessment Report.

items.title: Official Statistics: Number of exporting registered businesses in the UK, 2016 to 2024
items.summary: This release provides an estimate of the number and proportion of exporting registered businesses and the number and proportion of exporting registered small and medium enterprises (SMEs) in the UK between 2016 and 2024.

items.title: Decision: UK's steel trade measure from 1 July 2026
items.summary: Details about a new steel trade measure from 1 July 2026, which limits tariff-free steel import quota volumes.

items.title: Corporate report: Summary of the first Fair Work Agency Advisory Board meeting
items.summary: What was discussed at the first meeting of the Fair Work Agency (FWA) Advisory Board, on 7 May 2026.

items.title: Research: Carbon capture, usage and storage (CCUS): business models
items.summary: Updates on the proposed commercial frameworks for transport and storage, power, and industrial carbon capture business models.

items.title: Notice: Trade remedies notices: anti-dumping duty on bicycles and bicycle parts from Cambodia, China, Indonesia, Malaysia, Pakistan, Philippines, Sri Lanka, and Tunisia
items.summary: Trade remedies notices published by the Secretary of State for Business, Innovation, Science and Trade (previously Secretary of State for Business and Trade) relating to the anti-dumping duty on bicycles and bicycle parts from Cambodia, China, Indonesia, Malaysia, Pakistan, Philippines, Sri Lanka, and Tunisia.

items.title: Business Secretary: “I'm backing investment and innovation to power good growth in every corner of the UK”
items.summary: New Business Secretary at Farnborough International Airshow to set out stall to go further and faster for growth by commercialising science and innovation to deliver for every postcode.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets: latest update
items.summary: The most up to date snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with trading partners overseas.

items.title: Notice: Boiler Upgrade Scheme Regulations: approved standards, grant categories and grant levels
items.summary: Lists of standards, grant categories and grant levels that have been approved for the scheme.

items.title: Official Statistics: National survey of registered businesses’ exporting behaviours, attitudes and needs 2025
items.summary: Data from fieldwork completed across 2025. The publication will consist of data tables, a written analytical report and a technical report. The data provides insights on UK registered businesses' behaviour and attitudes in relation to exporting.

items.title: Notice: Warm Homes Loan Scheme: apply to participate as a lender (Phase 1)
items.summary: The Warm Homes Loan Scheme (WHLS) will unlock private lending and investment at scale for home retrofit.

items.title: Notice: Warm Homes Loan Scheme: due diligence and monitoring privacy notice
items.summary: How we will use your personal data and what your rights are.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Correspondence: Capacity Market auction parameters: letter from DESNZ to NESO, July 2026
items.summary: Letter setting out the Capacity Market auction parameters for the T-1 auction for the 2027 to 2028 delivery year, and the T-4 auction for the 2030 to 2031 delivery year.

items.title: Independent report: NESO Electricity Capacity Report 2026: findings of the Panel of Technical Experts
items.summary: Report by the DESNZ independent Panel of Technical Experts providing advice on the National Energy System Operator’s 2026 Electricity Capacity Report.

items.title: New PM cuts tax on household electricity bills to give breathing space on cost of living
items.summary: New Prime Minister takes immediate action to cut taxes on electricity bills to give millions of households breathing space this winter.

items.title: Offshore Energy Strategic Environmental Assessment (SEA): An overview of the SEA process
items.summary: An explanation of the offshore SEA  process, including documentation of the most recent assessment and related consultation.

items.title: 2nd Offshore Carbon Dioxide Storage Licensing Round Appropriate Assessment
items.summary: Consultation on the Appropriate Assessment (AA) of areas applied for in the 2nd Offshore Carbon Dioxide Storage Licensing Round

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Corporate report: UK strategic export controls annual report 2025
items.summary: This report gives a detailed overview of the UK's strategic export controls policy and export licensing decisions for the period January to December 2025.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment core statistics book
items.summary: A monthly snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment position, summarising trade statistics produced by ONS, HMRC, DBT and others.

items.title: Notice: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 8: statutory notices
items.summary: Final statutory notices required to launch Contracts for Difference Allocation Round 8.

items.title: Official Statistics: Strategic export controls: licensing statistics 1 January to 31 March 2026
items.summary: Export control licensing data for 1 January to 31 March 2026.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Digest of UK Energy Statistics: 2025
items.summary: The Digest of United Kingdom Energy Statistics (DUKES) is the annual energy statistics publication of DESNZ. It provides a detailed and comprehensive picture on the production, trade and consumption of individual fuels and of energy as a whole.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: UK Energy in Brief: 2025
items.summary: Summary of some of the key annual statistics in the UK energy system: how energy is produced and used and the way in which energy use influences greenhouse gas emissions; combined heat and power, renewable energy, energy efficiency, energy prices and fuel poverty.

items.title: Official Statistics: Boiler Upgrade Scheme: June 2026
items.summary: Data monitoring the uptake of low carbon technologies on the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS), including the installation of air source heat pumps, ground source heat pumps and biomass boilers.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Solar PV deployment: June 2026
items.summary: Monthly deployment of solar photovoltaic capacity in the United Kingdom.

items.title: Official Statistics: Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund: May 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF) scheme in England.

items.title: Opt-out collective actions regime review: call for evidence
items.summary: This call for evidence seeks feedback on access to, and the operation of, the opt-out collective actions regime for competition law claims.

items.title: Swifter and simpler competition redress, regulatory appeals and competition enforcement
items.summary: This consultation includes proposals to make opt-out collective actions, regulatory appeals and competition enforcement swifter and simpler.

items.title: Low Carbon Kent
items.summary:
Low Carbon Kent is a network of businesses tackling and adapting to climate change.
They aim to reduce costs by cutting emissions and promote the opportunities of the low carbon market and circular economy.

items.title: Guidance: DBT standards for official statistics
items.summary: Department for Business and Trade's (DBT) statistical work programme and corporate standards for producing official statistics.

items.title: WTO General Council July 2026: UK Statements
items.summary: UK Statements at the World Trade Organization's General Council. Delivered by the UK's Permanent Representative to the WTO and the UN, Kumar Iyer.

items.title: Dame Jayne-Anne Gadhia appointed Chair of the Financial Reporting Council
items.summary: Dame Jayne-Anne will take on the role from September.

items.title: Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals process guidance and principles
items.summary: Guidance for making an appeal under the Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals (HSSA) process and the underlying principles of how cases are assessed.

items.title: Guidance: Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals assessment framework
items.summary: This framework brings together existing published material to provide more clarity on the principles applied when assessing Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals (HSSA) claims.

items.title: Transparency data: Department for Business and Trade information asset register
items.summary: This information asset register provides a summary of information assets held by the Department for Business and Trade (DBT) in the UK.
